mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the risk-free discount rate, compressing present-valued equity cash flows and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor demand and impending recession risk, triggering risk-off equity repricing and negative S&P 500 forward returns within one month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day forward returns in more than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction starts and consumer credit balances indicates robust housing-driven demand, supporting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint HOUST and RSAFS signal yields a negative predictive IC over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production directly increases capacity utilization and operating leverage, translating to higher profit margins and positive S&P 500 forward returns within one week.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to produce positive 5-day forward returns in more than 70 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation above 3.5 percent forces prolonged restrictive monetary policy, depressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Inflation above 3.5 percent periods show no statistically significant negative forward returns with a p-value greater than 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP directly expands the aggregate earnings base for S&P 500 constituents, driving positive equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows no positive correlation with 20-day SPX returns over a 5-year sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll growth and stable unemployment rates confirm a healthy labor market, reducing recession premiums and supporting equity valuations and positive S&P 500 forward returns within one month.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS and UNRATE signal yields negative predictive power over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid housing market cooling, falling construction starts lead to negative wealth effects and reduced consumer spending, depressing equity returns within one week.
failure_condition: HOUST declines do not produce negative 5-day forward returns in more than 65 percent of cases.
